'''nojapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:gymnosomatous|gymnosomatous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-j-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gymnosomatous|gymnosomatous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nojapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nojapithi|nojapithi]] || [[word:nojapiji|nojapiji]] || [[word:nojapishi|nojapishi]] || [[word:nojapiki|nojapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nojaputhuthu|nojaputhuthu]] || [[word:nojapujuju|nojapujuju]] || [[word:nojapushushu|nojapushushu]] || [[word:nojapukuku|nojapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nojaputhu|nojaputhu]] || [[word:nojapuju|nojapuju]] || [[word:nojapushu|nojapushu]] || [[word:nojapuku|nojapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nojapufthuf|nojapufthuf]] || [[word:nojapufjuf|nojapufjuf]] || [[word:nojapufshuf|nojapufshuf]] || [[word:nojapufkuf|nojapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nojapethe|nojapethe]] || [[word:nojapeje|nojapeje]] || [[word:nojapeshe|nojapeshe]] || [[word:nojapeke|nojapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nojapothotho|nojapothotho]] || [[word:nojapojojo|nojapojojo]] || [[word:nojaposhosho|nojaposhosho]] || [[word:nojapokoko|nojapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nojapotho|nojapotho]] || [[word:nojapojo|nojapojo]] || [[word:nojaposho|nojaposho]] || [[word:nojapoko|nojapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nojapofthof|nojapofthof]] || [[word:nojapofjof|nojapofjof]] || [[word:nojapofshof|nojapofshof]] || [[word:nojapofkof|nojapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nojapÃŸfthÃŸf|nojapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nojapÃŸfjÃŸf|nojapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nojapÃŸfshÃŸf|nojapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nojapÃŸfkÃŸf|nojapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nojapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|nojapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nojapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|nojapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nojapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|nojapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nojapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|nojapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nojapÃŸfthÃŸf|nojapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nojapÃŸfjÃŸf|nojapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nojapÃŸfshÃŸf|nojapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nojapÃŸfkÃŸf|nojapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nojapÃŸfthÃŸf|nojapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nojapÃŸfjÃŸf|nojapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nojapÃŸfshÃŸf|nojapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nojapÃŸfkÃŸf|nojapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nojapÃḊthÃḊ|nojapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:nojapÃḊjÃḊ|nojapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:nojapÃḊshÃḊ|nojapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:nojapÃḊkÃḊ|nojapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nojapathatha|nojapathatha]] || [[word:nojapajaja|nojapajaja]] || [[word:nojapashasha|nojapashasha]] || [[word:nojapakaka|nojapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nojapatha|nojapatha]] || [[word:nojapaja|nojapaja]] || [[word:nojapasha|nojapasha]] || [[word:nojapaka|nojapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nojapafthaf|nojapafthaf]] || [[word:nojapafjaf|nojapafjaf]] || [[word:nojapafshaf|nojapafshaf]] || [[word:nojapafkaf|nojapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nojapasha|nojapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nojapshÃḋasha|nojapshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nojaproasha|nojaproasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nojapmuasha|nojapmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nojapyaasha|nojapyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonojapnkshÃḋasha|gonojapnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonojapnkroasha|gonojapnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonojapnkmuasha|gonojapnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonojapnkyaasha|gonojapnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nojajapasha|nojajapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nojajapshÃḋasha|nojajapshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nojajaproasha|nojajaproasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nojajapmuasha|nojajapmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nojajapyaasha|nojajapyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonojajapnkshÃḋasha|gonojajapnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonojajapnkroasha|gonojajapnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonojajapnkmuasha|gonojajapnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonojajapnkyaasha|gonojajapnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nejÃḊpasha|nejÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nejÃḊpshÃḋasha|nejÃḊpshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nejÃḊproasha|nejÃḊproasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nejÃḊpmuasha|nejÃḊpmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nejÃḊpyaasha|nejÃḊpyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonejÃḊpnkshÃḋasha|gonejÃḊpnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonejÃḊpnkroasha|gonejÃḊpnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonejÃḊpnkmuasha|gonejÃḊpnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonejÃḊpnkyaasha|gonejÃḊpnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nojfapasha|nojfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nojfapshÃḋasha|nojfapshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nojfaproasha|nojfaproasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nojfapmuasha|nojfapmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nojfapyaasha|nojfapyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonojfapnkshÃḋasha|gonojfapnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonojfapnkroasha|gonojfapnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonojfapnkmuasha|gonojfapnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonojfapnkyaasha|gonojfapnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
